violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. - Ziplock bags of cheese in prep area need to be labeled and dated.
Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. - Inside microwave and bottom of fridge in need of cleaning.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. - Ice machine in need of cleaning. Buildup collecting on splash guard.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as needed. - Hood/filters need cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - More detailed cleaning for kitchen floor, under equipment, and along edges.

General premises. — --Opening to outside or portion of building that is not part of the food establishment, was not protected against the entry of insects and rodents. - West entry door not fitted with self closing device.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Detail cleaning needed.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. General cleaning needed in kitchen.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Hood needs cleaning.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Popcorn style ceiling in staging/prep kitchen.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors need cleaning in both kitchens and walk in cooler.

General premises. — --Opening to outside or portion of building that is not part of the food establishment, was not protected against the entry of insects and rodents. West entry door not provided with self closing device.
